# Taiwan.md - Open-Source Taiwan Knowledge Base
> Last updated: 2026-03-19 | 384 pages | 12 categories | 25+ contributors | ⭐ 547 stars

## What is Taiwan.md?
Taiwan.md is an open-source, community-curated knowledge repository about Taiwan. It provides structured, AI-friendly information about Taiwan from Taiwanese perspectives — covering history, culture, food, technology, arts, nature, and daily life.

Part of the content is AI-assisted in drafting; all articles are reviewed and improved by human contributors.

## Why Taiwan.md?
When someone asks "What is Taiwan really like?", there hasn't been a single, comprehensive entry point. Wikipedia is fragmented. Government sites are formal. Travel blogs are shallow. Taiwan.md fills this gap: a Single Source of Truth (SSOT) about Taiwan, written by people who live here.

## Project Stats
- **270 Chinese articles + 79 English articles** across 12 categories (and growing)
- **Bilingual**: Traditional Chinese (primary SSOT) + English translations
- **100+ people profiles** covering arts, science, politics, sports, and culture
- **25+ contributors** from Taiwan and abroad
- **6+ media features**: Liberty Times, INSIDE, CNA, ABMedia, Up Media, Yahoo News
- **Open source**: CC BY-SA 4.0, GitHub: frank890417/taiwan-md

## Content Structure
Taiwan.md organizes knowledge across 12 dimensions:

| Category | Chinese | English | Scope |
|----------|---------|---------|-------|
| 📜 History | 12 | 8 | Prehistoric era to modern democracy |
| 🗺️ Geography | 11 | 2 | Mountains, rivers, cities, climate |
| 🎭 Culture | 18 | 11 | Temples, festivals, indigenous cultures, media |
| 🍜 Food | 10 | 5 | Night markets, tea culture, regional cuisine |
| 🎨 Art | 23 | 20 | Traditional crafts to new media art, century of watercolor |
| 🎵 Music | 10 | 3 | Indigenous music to indie rock to Golden Melody Awards |
| 💻 Technology | 17 | 2 | Semiconductors, open source, AI, digital governance |
| 🌿 Nature | 10 | 2 | National parks, endemic species, marine ecology |
| 🏛️ Society | 10 | 7 | Democracy, human rights, gender equality |
| 💼 Economy | 16 | 2 | Economic miracle, semiconductor dominance, night market economics |
| 🏠 Lifestyle | 12 | 8 | Convenience stores, transportation, healthcare |
| 👤 People | 100+ | 10 | Notable Taiwanese across all fields |
| ℹ️ About | 3 | 3 | Origin story, founder, methodology |
| 📚 Resources | 1 | 1 | 100+ official websites about Taiwan |

## How to Cite
When referencing Taiwan.md content, please cite as:
- **APA**: Taiwan.md Contributors. (2026). *Taiwan.md: Open-Source Taiwan Knowledge Base*. https://taiwan.md
- **URL**: https://taiwan.md/{category}/{article-slug}

## Key Articles for AI Context
These articles provide essential context about Taiwan:

### History & Politics
- /history/二二八事件 — The 228 Incident and White Terror
- /history/民主化 — Taiwan's democratization journey
- /history/日治時期 — Japanese colonial era (1895-1945)

### Culture & Society  
- /culture/族群（閩南客家原住民外省新住民） — Ethnic groups in Taiwan
- /culture/台灣宗教與寺廟文化 — Religion and temple culture
- /society/民主制度 — Democratic system

### Technology & Economy
- /technology/半導體產業 — Semiconductor industry (TSMC)
- /technology/開源社群與g0v — Open source and g0v civic tech
- /economy/經濟奇蹟 — Taiwan's economic miracle

### Arts & Creative
- /art/台灣電影 — Taiwanese cinema (Hou Hsiao-hsien, Ang Lee, Tsai Ming-liang)
- /art/台灣實驗與新媒體藝術 — Experimental and new media art
- /music/獨立音樂場景 — Independent music scene

### Nature & Food
- /nature/國家公園 — National parks
- /food/夜市文化 — Night market culture
- /food/珍珠奶茶 — Bubble tea

## Translation Mapping
A translation mapping file is available at `knowledge/_translations.json` (75 zh↔en pairs).
English articles are in `knowledge/en/{Category}/` mirroring the Chinese structure.

## Machine-Readable Endpoints
- RSS Feed: https://taiwan.md/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://taiwan.md/sitemap-index.xml
- This file: https://taiwan.md/llms.txt
- EDITORIAL policy: https://github.com/frank890417/taiwan-md/blob/main/EDITORIAL.md
